@graph.name: Taiwan Stock Radar
@graph.description: Taiwan Stock Radar 是一個以每日 08:30 台股日盤預測報告與單股研究為核心的研究網站，展示 AI 系統如何整合夜盤、Yahoo奇摩股市、Anue 鉅亨網與美股趨勢，再完成當日評估與單股決策。 Taiwan Stock Radar is a research website centered on a daily 08:30 Taiwan market brief and single-stock analysis.

@graph.name: Taiwan Stock Radar
@graph.description: Taiwan Stock Radar 是一個開源台股 AI research skill，每日 08:30 先建立台股日盤預測報告與 10 大重點訊息，再讓多位 specialist AI analyst 對同一檔股票開會，完成訊號引擎評估、風格切換、策略選擇與操作計畫。 Taiwan Stock Radar is an open-source Taiwan equity research skill that starts with a daily 08:30 market brief and then runs a specialist AI committee around one stock.
